basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.nitw.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: 33 years for OBC-NCL, 35 years for SC/ST/PwD/Female candidates

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E in Electronics and Communication Engineering, M.Tech/M.E in Electronics and Communication Engineering or equivalent
qualification.details: JRF: B.Tech/ B.E or Equivalent degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering and M.Tech/ M.E in Electronics and Communication Engineering or equivalent with Research areas in Antenna and Microwave. (OR) B.Tech/ B.E or Equivalent degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Warangal Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: JRF: B.Tech/ B.E or Equivalent degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering and M.Tech/ M.E in Electronics and Communication Engineering or equivalent with Research areas in Antenna and Microwave. (OR) B.Tech/ B.E or Equivalent degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering.

content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: 33 years for OBC-NCL, 35 years for SC/ST/PwD/Female candidates

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Salary 2026
NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Warangal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 31st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Tech/B.E degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering and an M.Tech/M.E degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering or equivalent, with research areas in Antenna and Microwave. Alternatively, a B.Tech/B.E degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 30 years. Age relaxation is provided for OBC-NCL, SC, ST, PwD, and female candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 37,000, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Warangal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are accepted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on an interview, which can be conducted either online or offline.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NITW/2026/ECE/DoT-TTDF/TxRx/04.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post.

faq.question: Q10. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal).
